name: Lowfat Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Red Bliss potatoes, cut into 1-inch chunks (leave skin on)
1 tablespoon dijon mustard (or mustard of choice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potato chunks until fork-tender but not mushy.
2. Drain the potatoes and add the remaining ingredients: balsamic vinegar, dijon mustard, olive oil, and fresh ground pepper.
3. Mix gently to combine all flavors.
4. Optionally, experiment with additional spices such as dill, basil, or garlic for a different flavor profile.
5. Serve the potato salad warm or cold (the author prefers it cold).
6. Enjoy your low-fat potato salad!
